name: Poached Chicken with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 75 g cheese (such as Red Leicester or white Stilton)
recipeInstructions:
1. Roughly grate or chop the cheese. Place the wine and stock in a large saucepan and bring to a boil. Add the chicken breasts, reduce heat, cover with a lid, and simmer until cooked through, about 10 minutes.
2. Using a slotted spoon, remove the chicken and set aside in a warm place. Bring the remaining liquor back to a boil and bubble for 10-15 minutes or until it starts to become syrupy.
3. Remove from heat and add the cheese, stirring until melted. Add the crème fraîche. Slice the chicken breasts on the diagonal and pour the sauce over. Serve immediately on a bed of spinach, garnished with chopped fresh chives.
